hook.summary: Cinematic introduction of the Blood Knight character with a hook question.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a character in red armor followed by fast-paced combat scenes.
hook.text_overlay: YOU MIGHT BE A BLOOD KNIGHT IF...
hook.voiceover_transcript: You might be a Blood Knight if...

scene_flow: Cinematic close-up of the Blood Knight character with a hook question.
Gameplay footage showing the character fighting enemies in a dark dungeon.
Close-up of a demonic monster followed by more combat gameplay.
Cinematic shot of the character's face and armor.
End card with game logo, download links, and 'PLAY NOW' button.
on_screen_text: BEST ROLE PLAYING GAME WINNER DICE AWARDS
YOU MIGHT BE A BLOOD KNIGHT IF...
YOU'RE NOT AFRAID TO EMBRACE YOUR RAGE
audience_proxy: Hardcore RPG fans and Diablo series enthusiasts who enjoy dark fantasy and action-heavy gameplay.
